description: Implement client-side routing/session behavior for the Vite patient app. Scope: define public, anonymous-intake, auth, onboarding, billing, dashboard, and account routes; integrate Cognito sign-in/sign-up/reset/verify flows using existing auth client logic where portable; call /api/auth/session to set/clear the secure patient session cookie after Cognito authentication; redirect unauthenticated protected pages to sign-in with returnTo; ensure visual route guards do not replace server-side API authorization; handle loading/error states without exposing PHI. Acceptance criteria: protected Vite routes render safe shells until API auth succeeds; sign-in/out/session behavior matches existing app flows; route guard tests cover unauthenticated and authenticated navigation.
title: Add React Router route guards and patient session handling in Vite app
